arts.ttl: Is Thibaut Courtois injured? When will he be back?
arts.sum: Real Madrid will be without their first-choice goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois for the Copa del Rey game against Celta Vigo (Thursday 16 Jan, 3:30 p.m. ET / 12:30 p.m. PT). The good news for Real Madrid fans is that Courtois is not injured, and Ancelotti is simply resting the player.

arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti names his squad for Thursday's Copa del Rey clash with Celta Vigo, with a starter for the cup fixture also being confirmed.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid to appoint Xabi Alonso as next manager in 2025
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti’s future as Real Madrid manager has been in the news again this week after last weekend’s humiliating 5-2 defeat to Barcelona, and it appears that his second spell in charge at the Santiago Bernabeu is coming to an end. arts.ttl: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti – ‘I don’t think I’m the best, but I’m not the most stupid either’
arts.sum: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti was forced once again to defend his work this season on Wednesday, as he was back in front of the press for the first time since their Spanish Supercup defeat against Barcelona. He also calmed talk of moving Aurelien Tchouameni away from the centre-back position, despite struggling in the final.
